postReview.title: Palestine hold South Korea as Japan down China in World Cup qualifying
postReview.description: Palestine frustrated Son Heung-min and South Korea in a shock result in AFC World Cup qualifying, while Japan beat China 3-1.

QAData.question: Who won between China and Japan on Tue, 19 Nov 2024 12:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Japan won 3–1 over China on Tue, 19 Nov 2024 12:00:00 GMT.
